message:
feat: sandbox sync — branch-only polecat reuse (gt-24j2)

Phase 3 of persistent-polecat-pool: eliminate ~5s worktree creation
overhead when reusing idle polecats.

DONE→IDLE: After syncing worktree to main, delete the old polecat
branch to prevent stale branch accumulation.

IDLE→WORKING: New ReuseIdlePolecat() uses git checkout -b on the
existing worktree instead of git worktree add/remove. Falls back
to full RepairWorktreeWithOptions if branch-only reuse fails.

New git helper: CheckoutNewBranch(branch, startPoint) wraps
git checkout -b for clean branch creation from a ref.
